title: Windows WDigest Authentication Enabled for Credential Harvesting
description: Detects enabling WDigest authentication via registry modification. When enabled, plaintext credentials are stored in LSASS memory, making them available for extraction by tools like Mimikatz.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and (('Process Name' like '*reg.exe' and 'Command Line' like '*UseLogonCredential*'))
